name_en: Top-tier replica N48865 Blue mini (cowhide embossed crocodile) Noble crocodile pattern with gloss treatment, dazzling, luxurious goat leather lining and sparkling metal hardware, unique Capucines Yhl flap can be tucked inside to show the letter logo or flipped out to display the Monogram Flower pattern. Dimensions: 21 * 14 *8 cm
